description: SEO-dependent public marketing surface (landing pages, blog, docs, pricing). Heavy read, near-zero write. Goal: maximize Core Web Vitals + SEO crawlability. Build separate from the product codebase.

anti_recommendations.next-app-router-for-marketing: warn — RSC over-engineers marketing-site needs; static-first wins on CWV and DX
anti_recommendations.spa-for-marketing: kill — SEO catastrophe; no JS-rendered marketing site ranks competitively in 2026
anti_recommendations.custom-backend: kill — no writes means no backend
anti_recommendations.personalization-at-edge: warn — defer until SEO baseline is established
anti_recommendations.third-party-tag-soup: kill — every third-party script costs LCP and INP
anti_recommendations.ga4-default: warn — GA4 hurts CWV scores; prefer cookieless alternatives

canon_references: Web Almanac (HTTP Archive, 2025) — marketing-site CWV distribution
Addy Osmani, Web Performance for the Modern Web (2024) — static-first defaults
Google SearchGuide (2024) — Core Web Vitals as ranking signal
Plausible Analytics whitepaper (2023) — third-party tag impact on CWV
